# NetPlex — سوق غزة الموثوق

> NetPlex is a managed Arabic-first marketplace for Gaza, where vetted sellers list electronics and goods priced in ILS (₪). Deals close in-person; payments are never processed in-app.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured products, daily deals, and category discovery.
- [Browse / Search](/search): Search and filter all approved listings by category, region, condition, brand, and price.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse all marketplace categories.
- [Daily Deals](/deals): Time-limited discounts and hot offers.
- [About](/about): What NetPlex is and how the managed marketplace works.
- [Help Center](/help): FAQ covering buying, selling, accounts, and safety.
- [Safety Tips](/safety): How to transact safely in person.
- [Returns Policy](/returns): How returns and disputes are handled.
- [Install App](/install): Add NetPlex to your phone home screen (PWA).

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
